summary: Admin + CRM Quote Pack (P1) testing complete. All features working correctly after fixing QuotePreviewPage.jsx to use quotes-v2 endpoint.

minor.issue: Endpoint accessible without authentication - security finding

action_items: Consider adding auth protection to /api/admin/business-settings endpoint (currently accessible without auth)
critical_code_review_comments: QuotePreviewPage.jsx was using old /api/admin/quotes/{id} endpoint instead of /api/admin/quotes-v2/{id} - FIXED
seed_data_creation: Created test leads and quotes via API during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin + CRM Quote Pack testing complete. QuotePreviewPage.jsx was fixed to use quotes-v2 endpoint. Business settings endpoint lacks auth protection (documented as finding).

details.page_title: Business Settings - Canonical source for invoices, quotes, statements
details.sections: 4 sections: Business Identity, Contact Details, Banking Details, Document & Tax
details.fields_verified: company_name, trading_name, tin, brn, vrn, bank_name, bank_account_number, currency
details.data_pre_populated: Yes - loads existing data from MongoDB
details.save_functionality: Working - PUT updates and persists in MongoDB

business_settings_public_endpoint.details: Returns public business info without auth (company_name, phone, email, tin, bank details)

details.quote_creation: Creates real quote in database via POST /api/admin/crm-relationships/leads/{lead_id}/create-quote
details.quote_loads: Quote loads correctly with customer info pre-populated from lead
details.traceability: Quote has lead_id linking back to source lead

details.result_display: Shows base price, final price, margin amount, margin percentage, and source

bug_fixed.fix: Updated loadQuote(), updateStatus(), and convertToOrder() to use quotes-v2 endpoints
bug_fixed.impact: CRM Create Quote flow now works end-to-end
